name: Get System Info
description: Displays OS version, hostname, uptime, CPU, and RAM summary.
code: Get-ComputerInfo | Select-Object CsName, WindowsVersion, OsArchitecture, CsNumberOfLogicalProcessors, CsTotalPhysicalMemory

name: Get Public IP Address
description: Fetches the machine's public IP address via a web service.

name: Get Local IP Addresses
description: Lists all local IPv4 addresses and their adapter names.
code: Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -ne '127.0.0.1' } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, IPAddress

name: Test Network Connectivity
description: Tests connectivity to a host and returns round-trip time.

name: Download File
description: Downloads a file from a URL and saves it to a local path.

name: Find Large Files
description: Finds files larger than 100 MB recursively under a given directory.
code: Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\' -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 100MB } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object FullName, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round($_.Length/1MB,1)}}

name: Get Disk Usage
description: Shows free and total space for all local disk drives.

name: List Running Services
description: Lists all currently running Windows services sorted by name.
code: Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq 'Running' } | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object Name, DisplayName

name: Kill Process by Name
description: Stops all running processes matching a given name.

name: Get Top CPU Processes
description: Lists the top 10 CPU-consuming processes.
code: Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, CPU, WorkingSet

name: Get Installed Programs
description: Lists all installed programs via the registry, similar to Control Panel Programs list.
code: Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* | Select-Object DisplayName, DisplayVersion, Publisher | Sort-Object DisplayName

name: Read Registry Value
description: Reads a specific registry value from a given key.

name: Set Registry Value
description: Creates or updates a registry DWORD value. Run as Administrator for HKLM keys.

name: List WSL Distros
description: Lists all installed WSL distributions and their versions.

name: Export WSL Distro
description: Exports a WSL distribution to a .tar file for backup or migration.

name: Install winget Package
description: Installs a package by ID via winget, accepting all prompts automatically.

name: Update All winget Packages
description: Upgrades all installed winget packages to their latest versions.

name: Get Open Network Ports
description: Lists all listening TCP ports and the process using each one.
code: Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, @{N='ProcessName';E={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Name}} | Sort-Object LocalPort

name: Get Event Log Errors
description: Retrieves the 20 most recent error events from the Windows System event log.
code: Get-EventLog -LogName System -EntryType Error -Newest 20 | Select-Object TimeGenerated, Source, Message
example-output: TimeGenerated         Source     Message\n5/24/2026 08:00:00 AM Service Control Manager The service failed...

name: Create Symbolic Link
description: Creates a symbolic link (requires Administrator or Developer Mode enabled).
